title: Notification dated 31st January, 1992
text: 3 MINISTRY OF HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT (Department of Women& Child Development) NOTIFICATIONS S.O.99(E), dated New Delhi, the 31st January, 1992.-In exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 1 of the National Commission for Women, Act, 1990 (20 of 1990), the Central Government hereby appoints the 31st day of January, 1992, as the date on which the said Act shall come into force. [No.F.9-61/90-WW] UMA PILLAI, Jt. Secy. S.O.100(E), dated New Delhi, the 31st January, 1992.-In pursuance of section 3 of the National Commission for Women Act, 1990 (2o of 1990), the Central Government hereby constitutes the National Commission for Women and nominates the following persons as the Chairperson and Members of the Commission, namely:- 1. Ms. Jayanti Patnaik, Chairperson A-1, 310, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi. 2. Ms. Padma Seth, Member EB-166, Maya Enclave, New Delhi-110 064 3. Ms. Ganga Potai, Member M.I.G. 54, M.L.A. Quarters, Jawahar Chowk, Bhopal. 4. Ms. Subhashini Ali, Member 15/241, Civil Lines, Kanpur 5. Ms. Bonoj Senapati, Member C-6/B, D.D.A. Flats, Munirka, New Delhi - 110 067 6. Ms. Monika Das, Member 13, Chanakyapuri Hubli, Karnataka. 7. Ms. Uma Pillai, Member Secretary D-1/14, Bharati Nagar, New Delhi. 2. The Chairperson and the Members shall hold office for a period of three years from the date of constitution of the Commission. Ms. Uma Pillai, Joint Secretary (Women Development) in the Department of Women and Child Development, shall, in addition to her substantive charge, old office of the Member-Secretary until further orders but not exceeding three years. [No.F.9-61/90-WW] MEENAXI ANAND CHAUDHRY, Jt. Secy. S.O.2084, dated, New Delhi, the 29th June, 1992-In pursuance of section 3 of the National Commission for Women Act, 1990 (20 of 1990), the Central Government -- 1 of 2 -- 4 hereby nominates, with effect from the 29th May, 1992, Ms. Annie Prasad as Member- Secretary of the National Commission for Women vice Ms. Uma Pillai and for that purpose makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Human Resource Development (Department of Women and Child Development) number S.O.100(E), dated the 31st January, 1992 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 31st January, 1992 namely:- In the said notification,- (a) for serial number 7 and entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “7.Ms.Annie Prasad Member-Secretary”; IAS (GJ.63), Gujarat Bhawan Chankyapuri, New Delhi. (b) in paragraph2, for the portion beginning with “Ms.Uma Pillai, Joint Secretary (Women Development)” and ending with “not exceeding three years”, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “Ms.Annie Prasad shall hold the office of Member-Secretary for a period of three years from the afternoon of the 29th May, 1992, that is the date from which she assumed the charge of the said office.” [No.F.9-61/90-WW] MEENAXI ANAND CHAUDHRY, Jt. Secy. -- 2 of 2 --
